projects.title: Firewall ROI Calculator
projects.description: Architected and independently developed a Next.js and React application that enables customers to calculate ROI, Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), Payback Period, and recommended Fortinet firewall sizing using reusable calculation engines and server-side rendering.

projects.title: Product Carbon Footprint Calculator
projects.description: Developed an interactive application using React, Redux Toolkit, and D3.js to visualize product-level carbon footprint data while significantly improving application performance through lazy loading and computation caching.

projects.title: Firewall Upgrade Advisor
projects.description: Built a customer-facing application that recommends the most suitable firewall upgrade based on the customer's existing deployment and business requirements.

projects.title: OT Evaluation Tool
projects.description: Created an end-to-end security assessment platform allowing customers to evaluate OT security posture and instantly generate branded reports.

projects.title: NextGen Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a real-time React dashboard for appointment scheduling and room management using GraphQL and WebSockets.

projects.title: Health Plan Sales Application
projects.description: Developed Kaiser Permanente's health plan enrollment application by integrating Angular with Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), implementing secure checkout workflows and scalable content delivery.

projects.title: E-Commerce Service Center
projects.description: Developed a real-time React dashboard for appointment scheduling and room management using GraphQL and WebSockets.

projects.title: AMEX API portal
projects.description: Developed a real-time React dashboard for appointment scheduling and room management using GraphQL and WebSockets.
